message:
test(mcp): golden freeze for tool/resource manifest (ft-mejto)

Adds tests/mcp_manifest_golden.rs covering the complete MCP protocol
surface (tools + resources + resource templates with names, descriptions,
input/output schemas, tags, versions, and annotations). The canonical
manifest is stored at tests/fixtures/mcp_manifest.json and any drift —
tool additions/removals, description wording changes, schema shape
changes — fails the golden test. Regenerate with UPDATE_GOLDEN=1.

Also asserts: determinism across repeated captures, tool-name and
resource-URI uniqueness, input-schema shape (must be "object"), and
non-empty tool set in the no-db variant.

Verified: 6/6 tests pass under --no-default-features --features
mcp,asupersync-runtime. Drift detection confirmed via canary mutation.

files.patch:
